title: executeRounds returns real round count → fleet-synthesis.json + fleet-report.json
description: Make FleetCoordinator.executeRounds return { executions: ChildExecution[]; roundsRun: number } where roundsRun is the ACTUAL round at which the bounded loop terminated (== maxRounds on a full run; < maxRounds when the no-new-findings early-stop fires). Thread roundsRun through runFleet into (a) collect(...) so .bober/fleet-synthesis.json.rounds is the real count instead of the maxRounds cap, and (b) reporter.build(...) so .bober/fleet-report.json gains an OPTIONAL rounds field — present ONLY on blackboard runs so the no-blackboard report stays byte-identical. Remove the now-obsolete `bober:` ceiling comment + the hardcoded `roundsRun = maxRounds` assignment in runFleet. synthesis.ts is unchanged (collect already takes rounds:number). The no-blackboard coordinator.execute path is untouched.

successCriteria.description: Build + typecheck pass with zero errors (npm run build, npm run typecheck).

Full suite passes; only the 6 known cockpit-integration MCP failures may fail; all existing fleet coordinator/index/reporter/synthesis tests pass (updated where the executeRounds return shape changed).

executeRounds returns { executions, roundsRun }. roundsRun === the round at which the loop terminated: a full run (no early-stop) → roundsRun === maxRounds; an early-stopped run (round 2 of maxRounds=3 adds zero new findings) → roundsRun === 2. A test asserts BOTH cases (full-run and early-stop) and that executions is still the final round's ChildExecution[].

On a blackboard run, .bober/fleet-synthesis.json.rounds === the real executed count. A test runs an EARLY-STOPPED blackboard fleet (stops at round 2 of maxRounds=3) and asserts synthesis.rounds === 2 (NOT 3).

PortfolioReport gains an OPTIONAL rounds?: number. On a blackboard run, .bober/fleet-report.json.rounds === the real executed count (=== synthesis.rounds). build(outcomes) with no rounds arg omits the key; build(outcomes, { rounds: N }) includes rounds===N. A reporter test asserts both, and a runFleet blackboard test asserts report.rounds === the early-stop count.

Byte-identical no-blackboard path: a no-blackboard runFleet writes a fleet-report.json with NO rounds key and writes NO fleet-synthesis.json; existing no-blackboard fleet tests pass unchanged. A test asserts the absent rounds key on the no-blackboard report.

lint passes (zero errors); the change is confined to coordinator.ts, index.ts, reporter.ts (+ their tests) with synthesis.ts unchanged; collect stays pure (no provider/network import); the never-throw exit-0 contract is preserved; the obsolete `bober:` ceiling comment + hardcoded roundsRun=maxRounds line are removed.

nonGoals: Do NOT change the early-stop logic, the rounds cap, or any other Phase-B behavior.
Do NOT add rounds to the no-blackboard fleet-report.json or write a synthesis file on no-blackboard runs (byte-identical).
Do NOT modify synthesis.ts beyond what's needed (collect already takes rounds — likely zero changes).
Do NOT add logging, history events, or any CLI surface.
Do NOT touch SharedBlackboard, the config.fleet/manifest schema, or the blackboard CLI.
Do NOT count 'productive' rounds — roundsRun is the round the loop terminated at, including a final round that added no findings.
stopConditions: executeRounds returns the real roundsRun, both fleet-synthesis.json and fleet-report.json carry the real executed count on blackboard runs, the no-blackboard report is byte-identical (no rounds key, no synthesis file), and build/typecheck/test/lint are green
definitionOfDone: executeRounds returns { executions, roundsRun } with roundsRun = the terminating round (==maxRounds on full run, <maxRounds on early-stop). runFleet destructures it, removes the hardcoded roundsRun=maxRounds + the bober: ceiling comment, passes rounds into reporter.build only on the blackboard branch (no-blackboard build call unchanged → byte-identical report) and into collect. PortfolioReport.rounds is optional. Collocated tests cover full-run vs early-stop roundsRun, synthesis.rounds real count on early-stop, report.rounds real count + optional-key behavior, and the byte-identical no-blackboard path. Build/typecheck/test/lint green.
assumptions: executeRounds (coordinator.ts:55-82) currently returns ChildExecution[] and is called ONLY by runFleet (index.ts:185) + the two test files (grep-verified); it is a private method, not exported, so the return-shape change is safe and confined to src/fleet/.

The loop `for (let r = 1; r <= opts.maxRounds; r++)` (coordinator.ts:69) — set roundsRun = r at the top of each iteration (or capture r before the break); on exit roundsRun holds the last executed round. manifest.blackboard.maxRounds is int min(1) max(3) so the loop always runs >=1 → roundsRun >= 1.

runFleet (index.ts:165-213): `let roundsRun = 0` already exists at :168; replace the hardcoded `roundsRun = effectiveManifest.blackboard!.maxRounds` (:184) + remove the bober: comment (:181-183) with `const { executions: ex, roundsRun: rr } = await coordinator.executeRounds(...)` (assign executions=ex, roundsRun=rr). The single `reporter.build(outcomes)` call at :199 becomes `reporter.build(outcomes, bb ? { rounds: roundsRun } : undefined)`. The existing `collect(bb, report, roundsRun)` at :205 now passes the real count.

reporter.ts (PortfolioReport :17-24, build :39-62): add `rounds?: number` to the interface; change build to `build(outcomes: ChildOutcome[], opts?: { rounds?: number })` and include `...(opts?.rounds !== undefined ? { rounds: opts.rounds } : {})` in the returned object so a no-arg call is byte-identical.
synthesis.ts collect(blackboard, childResults, rounds) (synthesis.ts:29-39) needs NO change — only the value passed in changes.
outOfScope: SharedBlackboard internals, config.fleet/manifest schema, the blackboard CLI
generatorNotes:
Read FIRST in full: src/fleet/coordinator.ts (executeRounds :55-82 + runChildRound — the never-reject thunk you must NOT alter), src/fleet/index.ts (runFleet blackboard branch :165-213), src/fleet/reporter.ts (PortfolioReport + build), src/fleet/synthesis.ts (collect — expect zero edits), plus src/fleet/coordinator.test.ts + src/fleet/index.test.ts + src/fleet/reporter.test.ts for the test patterns.

STEP 1 coordinator.ts: change executeRounds return type to `Promise<{ executions: ChildExecution[]; roundsRun: number }>`. Add `let roundsRun = 0;` before the loop; set `roundsRun = r;` as the FIRST statement inside the for-body (so it captures the round even when the break fires later in the same iteration); `return { executions: lastExecutions, roundsRun };`. Do NOT touch the early-stop condition, the scaffold-once gating, or runChildRound. Trace: full run (no break) → roundsRun=maxRounds; break at r=2 → roundsRun=2; maxRounds=1 → roundsRun=1.

STEP 2 index.ts: at the executeRounds call site (:185), destructure: `const { executions: roundExecutions, roundsRun: rr } = await coordinator.executeRounds(effectiveManifest, bb, { maxRounds: effectiveManifest.blackboard!.maxRounds, dbPath });` then `executions = roundExecutions; roundsRun = rr;`. DELETE the `bober:` comment block (:181-183) and the `roundsRun = effectiveManifest.blackboard!.maxRounds;` line (:184). Change the report build (:199) to `const report = reporter.build(outcomes, bb ? { rounds: roundsRun } : undefined);`. Leave `collect(bb, report, roundsRun)` (:205) as-is (now real). The no-blackboard branch (coordinator.execute) and `let roundsRun = 0` (:168) stay.

STEP 3 reporter.ts: `export interface PortfolioReport { ...; children: ChildOutcome[]; rounds?: number }`. `build(outcomes: ChildOutcome[], opts?: { rounds?: number }): PortfolioReport` — add `...(opts?.rounds !== undefined ? { rounds: opts.rounds } : {})` to the returned literal. A no-arg build() is byte-identical (no rounds key).

STEP 4 tests: (coordinator.test.ts) update EVERY `await coordinator.executeRounds(...)` to destructure `.executions` (the Sprint-3 tests assert results.length / results[i] — rename to `const { executions: results, roundsRun } = ...`). Add to the existing early-stop test (sc-3-4 region): assert `roundsRun === 2`. Add/extend a full-run test: assert `roundsRun === maxRounds`. (reporter.test.ts) assert build(outcomes) has no 'rounds' key (e.g. `expect('rounds' in report).toBe(false)`) and build(outcomes,{rounds:2}).rounds===2. (index.test.ts) extend the sc-4-4 blackboard test (or add one) using a runner that publishes findings only in round 1 so the loop early-stops at round 2 → assert BOTH fleet-synthesis.json.rounds===2 AND fleet-report.json.rounds===2; extend the no-blackboard test to assert the report has no 'rounds' key (`'rounds' in report === false`). Follow ESM .js imports, import type, unicode section headers, no synchronous fs. Commit `bober(sprint-1): real executed round count in fleet synthesis + report`.
evaluatorNotes: sc-1-3: read coordinator.ts — confirm executeRounds returns { executions, roundsRun } and roundsRun is set to r each iteration (captured before any break). Run a full-rounds fake (findings grow every round) → roundsRun===maxRounds; an early-stop fake (round 2 adds none) → roundsRun===2; confirm executions is still the final round's array. sc-1-4: an early-stopped blackboard runFleet → parse .bober/fleet-synthesis.json → rounds===2 (NOT maxRounds=3). sc-1-5: reporter.build(outcomes) → 'rounds' NOT in the object; build(outcomes,{rounds:N}) → rounds===N; a blackboard runFleet → fleet-report.json.rounds===the executed count and equals synthesis.rounds. sc-1-6 (CRITICAL byte-identical): a no-blackboard runFleet → fleet-report.json has NO 'rounds' key and NO fleet-synthesis.json exists; existing no-blackboard tests pass unchanged. sc-1-2: FULL suite, only the 6 known cockpit failures; grep that synthesis.ts is unchanged or trivially so and has no network import; confirm the `bober:` ceiling comment is gone from index.ts. Build/typecheck/lint clean. git stat should show only coordinator.ts, index.ts, reporter.ts + their 3 test files.
